questions.rationale: Addresses core climate denial argument that undermines public understanding of climate science reliability
questions.misinformation_narrative: Climate skeptics claim climate models are unreliable and consistently wrong, undermining public support for climate action
questions.public_stakes: Distrust in climate science delays critical policy responses to climate change, worsening future impacts
questions.verification_reason: Climate skeptic websites like Watts Up With That, conservative media, and social media communities regularly attack climate model reliability.

discovery_sources.origin: Unbiased Science: Food Allergies: A Tough Nut to Crack

alternative_sources.organization_full: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
alternative_sources.resource_name: Food Allergy Information for Schools
alternative_sources.description: CDC's guidance document that includes information about the natural history of food allergies and outgrowing patterns
alternative_sources.relevance: Provides evidence-based information about which food allergies children commonly outgrow and which tend to persist

alternative_sources.resource_name: Guidelines for the Diagnosis and Management of Food Allergy in the United States
alternative_sources.description: Comprehensive clinical practice guidelines that include data on food allergy natural history and resolution rates
alternative_sources.relevance: Contains specific evidence about outgrowing rates for different food allergies (milk, egg, peanut, etc.) based on clinical studies

alternative_sources.resource_name: Clinical Report: Effects of Early Nutritional Interventions on the Development of Atopic Disease
alternative_sources.description: AAP clinical report addressing food allergy development and natural history in children
alternative_sources.relevance: Provides pediatric-focused evidence on food allergy outcomes and resolution patterns

alternative_sources.resource_name: Cochrane systematic reviews on food allergy natural history
alternative_sources.description: Systematic reviews examining longitudinal studies of food allergy resolution in children
alternative_sources.relevance: Synthesizes high-quality evidence from multiple studies on rates of outgrowing different food allergies

alternative_sources.resource_name: WAO White Book on Allergy
alternative_sources.description: Global report on allergic diseases including epidemiological data on food allergy natural history
alternative_sources.relevance: Provides international perspective and data on food allergy resolution rates across different populations

questions.readiness_summary: No NASEM coverage — 5 alternative sources identified

questions.question: Is climate change actually accelerating as fast as scientists claim?
Does global warming cause breathing problems?
